name: Long-Context Fine-Tuning with Limited VRAM
summary: arXiv:2607.15105v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning reduces model and optimizer memory, but dense attention still makes long training sequences expensive. We combine Hie...
description: arXiv:2607.15105v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning reduces model and optimizer memory, but dense attention still makes long training sequences expensive. We combine Hierarchical Global Attention (HGA) with segment-wise backpropagation and tiered KV storage. Only the active segment remains differentiable in VRAM; older KV is detached into RAM or NVMe, and HGA loads a...
author: Vladimir Fedosov, Aleksandr Sazhin, Artemiy Grinenko, Frank Woernle
